response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the provided lyrics for 'Baka Mitai'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for the musical performance section; manual transcription and translation were performed for the preceding dialogue and visual text. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed dialogue to vocal bursts and synchronized lyrics precisely with the audio waveform. Included subtitles for prominent on-screen text during the transition.

subtitles.original: And we... I guess we already have that.
subtitles.english: And we... I guess we already have that.

subtitles.original: I can look for it. Bennie... what else do we need?
subtitles.english: I can look for it. Bennie... what else do we need?

subtitles.original: We need a sell out.
subtitles.english: We need a sell out.

subtitles.original: We need to sell out. Ah... I'm so tired from all this thinking.
subtitles.english: We need to sell out. Ah... I'm so tired from all this thinking.

subtitles.original: I think we need to explore other genres, Cecilia Emergreen.
subtitles.english: I think we need to explore other genres, Cecilia Emergreen.

subtitles.original: Like what?
subtitles.english: Like what?

subtitles.original: Every genre. I think that's the only way.
subtitles.english: Every genre. I think that's the only way.

subtitles.original: What?
subtitles.english: What?

subtitles.original: Where are we? GG?
subtitles.english: Where are we? GG?

subtitles.original: What is this? What is this? Are we... are we in my head?
subtitles.english: What is this? What is this? Are we... are we in my head?

subtitles.original: Wait, are we in your head? Are we in my head?
subtitles.english: Wait, are we in your head? Are we in my head?

subtitles.original: This is just like fan fiction.
subtitles.english: This is just like fan fiction.

subtitles.original: This is just like fan fiction! Does this mean we're going to steal people's ideas?
subtitles.english: This is just like fan fiction! Does this mean we're going to steal people's ideas?

subtitles.original: No, they're my ideas. We're in my head.
subtitles.english: No, they're my ideas. We're in my head.

subtitles.original: But this is my head! I'm going to steal your idea.
subtitles.english: But this is my head! I'm going to steal your idea.

subtitles.original: You can't steal my ideas. / I could!
subtitles.english: You can't steal my ideas. / I could!

subtitles.original: Wait, what if... what if I see every single idea that's in your head and then I take them from you and then... I kill you?
subtitles.english: Wait, what if... what if I see every single idea that's in your head and then I take them from you and then... I kill you?

subtitles.original: You're taking my ideas! If you go too deep into my brain, you'll get to the yaoi part.
subtitles.english: You're taking my ideas! If you go too deep into my brain, you'll get to the yaoi part.

subtitles.original: Oh, oh! Maybe we should start with my brain. It's okay, it's okay.
subtitles.english: Oh, oh! Maybe we should start with my brain. It's okay, it's okay.

subtitles.original: Wait, wait! What's in your brain? / Nothing.
subtitles.english: Wait, wait! What's in your brain? / Nothing.

subtitles.original: Um, actually, there's a lot in my brain. For example...
subtitles.english: Um, actually, there's a lot in my brain. For example...

subtitles.original: Your brain is full of bad romance novels. We can't put that in our show!
subtitles.english: Your brain is full of bad romance novels. We can't put that in our show!

subtitles.original: Yeah we can! We can put it in our show! Yeah, let's put it in our show! Yeah, yeah, yeah!
subtitles.english: Yeah we can! We can put it in our show! Yeah, let's put it in our show! Yeah, yeah, yeah!

subtitles.original: Romance... romance... romance.
subtitles.english: Romance... romance... romance.

subtitles.original: I guess we need a break free out of this place.
subtitles.english: I guess we need a break free out of this place.

subtitles.original: DROPPED OUT OF SCHOOL MUSICAL
subtitles.english: [Text: Dropped Out of School Musical]

subtitles.original: ～とあるふたりの青春譚～ ある日、パーティーに参加したクロイとジブリエラ。バスケットボールが大好きなクロイと他の子とは何かが違う、ジブリエラ。
subtitles.english: [Text: ~The Youthful Tale of a Certain Duo~ One day, Croy and Gibriella attended a party. Croy loves basketball, and Gibriella is a bit different from other girls...]

subtitles.original: I don't want to sing. I'm just a normal boy.
subtitles.english: I don't want to sing. I'm just a normal boy.

subtitles.original: I just want to play basketball with my friends and get my head in the game. I can't sing. I'm just Troy.
subtitles.english: I just want to play basketball with my friends and get my head in the game. I can't sing. I'm just Troy.

subtitles.original: Get it together Gibriella. We don't have time for extracurriculars, we have to get into college.
subtitles.english: Get it together Gibriella. We don't have time for extracurriculars, we have to get into college.

subtitles.original: I'm not like other girls, I just want to stay at home and read books.
subtitles.english: I'm not like other girls, I just want to stay at home and read books.

subtitles.original: ばかみたい 子供なのね
subtitles.english: I'm like a fool, I'm just a child

subtitles.original: 夢を追って傷ついて
subtitles.english: Chasing dreams and getting hurt

subtitles.original: 嘘が下手なくせに 笑えない笑顔みせた
subtitles.english: Despite being a bad liar, you showed me a smile you couldn't laugh with

subtitles.original: I love youも ろくに言わない
subtitles.english: You won't even say "I love you" properly

subtitles.original: 口下手でほんまに不器用
subtitles.english: You're bad with words and really clumsy

subtitles.original: なのになのにどうして サヨナラは言えたの
subtitles.english: Yet, yet, why were you able to say goodbye?

subtitles.original: ダメだね ダメよダメなのよ
subtitles.english: It's no good, it's no good, it's just no good

subtitles.original: あんたが 好きで好きすぎて
subtitles.english: I love you, I love you too much

subtitles.original: どれだけ 強いお酒でも
subtitles.english: No matter how strong the liquor is

subtitles.original: 歪まない思い出が バカみたい
subtitles.english: The memories that don't warp, it's like a fool

subtitles.original: 馬鹿みたい 本当バカね
subtitles.english: It's like a fool, truly a fool

subtitles.original: あんた信じるばかりで
subtitles.english: Just believing in you

subtitles.original: 強い女のふり 切なさの夜風浴びる
subtitles.english: Pretending to be a strong woman, bathed in the night wind of sadness
